relationToApplicantInfo: I have sat with the applicant on numerous occasions over the past four years in the Crown Court at Southwark. I have observed their conduct in complex multi-handed cases and have had opportunity to assess their performance at length.
abilityReference: The applicant demonstrates a high level of advocacy skill commensurate with the level applied for. Their cross-examination technique is incisive and well-prepared, and they manage complex legal arguments with clarity and composure.
applicantEffectiveness: The applicant shows sound legal decision making throughout proceedings. Their case strategy is thoughtful and proportionate, and they adapt effectively when cases develop unexpectedly during trial.
interpersonalSkillsReference: The applicant maintains a professional and respectful manner with the judiciary, witnesses and opposing counsel at all times. They communicate clearly with juries and demonstrate sensitivity when dealing with vulnerable witnesses.
additionalInformationForReference: I have no hesitation in supporting this application. The applicant is a highly capable advocate who consistently performs at the standard required for Level 4 panel work.
